svg.title: Azure WhatsApp RAG Agent — System Architecture
svg.desc: Complete system architecture diagram showing all zones: User, WhatsApp Cloud API, Azure Container Apps (FastAPI), Azure Storage, External APIs, GitHub, and Admin Panel with labelled data flows.
svg.text: Zone 3 — Azure Container Apps · FastAPI · Python 3.11

g.text: injects conversation history as HumanMessage / AIMessage

svg.text: all tool calls logged → agent_tool_calls table

g.text: FAISS vectorstore · 916 chunks from 3 PDFs (NBRO landslide, NBRO housing, DMC Sinhala)
9-11. Write to community_reports.db · log status · update user_reliability · return trilingual ack

svg.text: Zone 7 — Admin Panel (Browser · Static SPA on GitHub Pages)

g.text: Deployment: Docker · Azure Container Registry (whatsappagentacr) · Azure Container Apps East US · env whatsapp-agent-env · secrets in env vars
